candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label on the income statement; best direct match for REVT.
Also a valid top-line sales label; appears equal to Total Revenue and can serve as alternate across years.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list per instructions; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Candidate list provides this label, but it is a balance-sheet inventory component rather than an income-statement expense, so it is not the correct COGS mapping here.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the correct concept. Chose 'Materials Purchased' from the Income Statement A-column as the closest direct production/service cost line for COGS. Manual review recommended because this is an outside-candidate selection and the company does not report an explicit 'Cost of sales'/'COGS' line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Materials Purchased

candidates.why: Operating overhead-type expense and not a total/subtotal; suitable SG&A component.
Typical operating overhead component; suitable SG&A component.
Catch-all overhead bucket; row exists even if preview is sparse.
Equity reserve, not an operating expense; not suitable for SG&A.
Headcount disclosure, not an expense row; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal line is present, so selected the best overhead component buckets and excluded COGS, depreciation, amortization, impairments, interest, and taxes.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; not a valid XRD expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization disclosure, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance-sheet asset, not income-statement R&D expense.
Balance-sheet asset detail, not income-statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance-sheet contra-asset detail, not income-statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No current-period R&D expense line is reported in the provided statements. Capitalized R&D asset/amortization disclosures are not mapped to XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct match to interest expense; preferred per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component that may be the only available line in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental version of lease-liability interest; lower priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list of interest-expense labels; later code should use the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.why: Equity line, but not preferred over a more explicit shareholders' equity label.
Best match for parent/common shareholders' equity and excludes minority interest based on comparison to Total Equity.
This is minority interest, not book equity attributable to owners.
Includes minority interest; use only if no owner/parent equity line exists.
Balancing/subtotal row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not book equity.

variables.notes: Prefer owner/shareholder equity to avoid double counting with MIB. 'Total Equity' not used because explicit shareholder-equity lines exist.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation line, not preferred when a balance-sheet minority-interest line exists.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; valid MIB mapping.
Direct balance-sheet minority-interest line; simplest and best match.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred over balance-sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not a minority-interest balance-sheet line.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list.
